data: {"generalSituation":"The subtropical ridge will bring generally fine and persistently very hot weather to Guangdong in the next couple of days. With the subtropical ridge weakening and under the influence of a broad trough of low pressure, there will be showers and thunderstorms over southern China in the latter part of this week. Besides, Tropical Cyclone Mekkhala will move across the seas east of the Philippines and continue to intensify tomorrow. It will then move in the general direction of Taiwan to the vicinity of the Ryukyu Islands.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260622","week":"Monday","forecastWind":"South to southwest force 4.","forecastWeather":"Mainly fine.
